{
  "summary": "Audrey is a woman who believes she is receiving messages from God, who tells her she is a very clever person and should show her work to others. She has been keeping this secret from her family and her GP. She has been neglecting her work and sleep, and has been sending copies of her work to the Archbishop of Canterbury and the Pope, but has not received replies. She feels that her family is not very clever. She has been feeling fantastic and has a lot of energy from God. She has been showing her work to some people, but not many. She has been feeling physically fine. She has been taking Prozac in the past but stopped. She has been talking to her GP about her work but the GP has not been paying attention to her and has been changing the subject. Audrey is fed up with her GP and wants to talk to the top person, the boss, or the head person. She has been rude to her GP and wants to talk to someone else.",
